content: By accessing or using Y2Mate.vc (the “Service”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must not access or use the Service.
Y2Mate.vc provides a web-based technical tool that allows users to process publicly accessible YouTube links upon request.
The Service does not host, store, or distribute copyrighted content. All processing is initiated by the user.
By using the Service, you agree to:
list: Use the Service only for personal and lawful purposes
